zh.Dunglass, East Lothian, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安登格拉斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Donald Campbell Laird van Lochow en Benderloch於1260年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾洛霍時，他的父親Cailean or Colin Mor Campbell30歲，母親Janet Isabel Sinclair28歲。他於大約1285年與Amabilla結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1320年4月6日在蘇格蘭阿吉爾享年60歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.Dunglass, East Lothian, Scotland: 英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安登格拉斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Donald Campbell Laird van Lochow en Benderloch于1260年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾洛霍时，他的父亲Cailean or Colin Mor Campbell30岁，母亲Janet Isabel Sinclair28岁。他于大约1285年与Amabilla结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1320年4月6日在苏格兰阿吉爾享年60岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Campbell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Campell
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: variant of   Campbell   (see also   Camel  ).

variants.name: Beauchamp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Camel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Napoleon, Patrice.

English (of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Norman French came(i)l ‘camel’ (from Latin camelus, classical Greek kamēlos), possibly denoting a clumsy person or someone with long legs. It may also be a topographic or habitational name referring to a house with a sign depicting a camel (although surnames derived from house and inn signs are rare in English); compare 5 below.
English: possibly a habitational name from Queen Camel and West Camel in Somerset, early recorded as Camel(le), possibly a Celtic name from canto- ‘border, district’ and mēl ‘bare hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Donald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Gaelic Domhnall . The final -d of the Anglicized form derives partly from misinterpretation by English speakers of the Gaelic pronunciation, and partly from association with Germanic-origin names such as Ronald . This name is strongly associated with clan Macdonald, the clan of the medieval Lords of the Isles, but is now also widely used by families with no Scottish connections.

en.lifeSummary: When Donald Campbell Laird van Lochow en Benderloch was born in 1260, in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, his father, Cailean or Colin Mor Campbell, was 30 and his mother, Janet Isabel Sinclair, was 28. He married Amabilla about 1285. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 6 April 1320, in Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 60, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Donald Campbell Laird van Lochow en Benderloch est né en 1260, à Lochawe, Argyll, Écosse, son père, Cailean or Colin Mor Campbell, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Janet Isabel Sinclair, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Amabilla environ 1285. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 6 avril 1320, à Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Donald Campbell Laird van Lochow en Benderloch 1260 in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Cailean or Colin Mor Campbell 30 und seine Mutter Janet Isabel Sinclair 28. Er hat um 1285 Amabilla geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 6. April 1320 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Argyll, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Donald Campbell Laird van Lochow en Benderlochが1260年にスコットランドアルグイルロチャウで生まれた時，父Cailean or Colin Mor Campbellは30歳，母Janet Isabel Sinclairは28歳であった。約1285年にAmabillaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1320年4月6日にスコットランドアルグイルで60歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Donald Campbell Laird van Lochow en Benderloch(이)가 1260년 스컷랜드 아그이 럭아베에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Cailean or Colin Mor Campbell(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Janet Isabel Sinclair(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1285년 Amabilla(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1320년 4월 6일 스컷랜드 아그이에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Donald Campbell Laird van Lochow en Benderloch родился в 1260 г. в местности лочав, аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Cailean or Colin Mor Campbell было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Janet Isabel Sinclair, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Amabilla около 1285 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 6 апреля 1320 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.
